CSRFToken.description: Required on write endpoints; enforced by middleware.CSRF.
CSRFToken.name: X-CSRF-Token

WorkspaceAuth.description: Workspace hash via query param or JSON body; resolved by workspaceMiddleware.
WorkspaceAuth.name: workspace

WorkspaceRegisteredAuth.description: Workspace must be already-registered (write-path gate); enforced by workspaceRegisteredMiddleware.
WorkspaceRegisteredAuth.name: workspace

info.description: Self-describing OpenAPI 3.0 spec for nano-brain's non-MCP REST API
info.title: nano-brain REST API

post.description: Runs a single harvest pass (OpenCode/Claude Code session ingestion) synchronously
Re-reads the YAML config file and applies any reloadable settings without restarting the server

get.description: Reports DB status, migration version, embedding queue depth, and harvester status
Returns all collections for the workspace with document counts

post.description: Registers a new file-watched collection under the workspace
post.summary: Add a collection to a workspace

delete.description: Deletes a collection and detaches its file watcher

put.description: Renames a collection and re-points its documents to the new name

get.description: Returns the current resolved config with secrets redacted. Pass ?include_source=true to also return the config file path.

post.description: Applies a single-field patch to the config YAML and triggers a config reload. Secret fields cannot be patched via this endpoint.

get.description: Runs config and binary prerequisite checks and reports pass/fail status for each
Returns documents for the workspace, optionally filtered by text/collection/tags query params

delete.description: Deletes a document by ID within the workspace

get.description: Streams document/collection/workspace change events for the given workspace as an SSE stream. Not a JSON request/response endpoint — no response body schema.
get.summary: Stream workspace events via Server-Sent Events

post.description: Fetches a document by source path or ID within the workspace

requestBody.description: Path or ID to look up

post.description: Registers a root path as a workspace and creates its default collections (memory, sessions, code). When db is non-nil, all three DB operations are wrapped in a single transaction.
Fetches multiple documents by source paths and/or IDs within the workspace

requestBody.description: Paths and/or IDs to look up

post.summary: Get multiple documents in one call

post.description: Deletes all documents (and related code-summarization data) for a workspace without removing the workspace registration itself
post.summary: Delete all documents in a workspace

get.description: Queries sessions tagged "ticket:<id>" across all workspaces (not scoped to a single workspace)
get.summary: Find sessions by ticket ID across all workspaces

get.description: Returns indexed symbols (functions, types, etc.) optionally filtered by name query or kind
get.summary: List code symbols in a workspace

get.description: Returns all tags used in the workspace with document counts per tag

Returns recent memories, active collections, and workspace stats. Mounted at both GET /api/v1/wake-up (unauthenticated, api group) and POST /api/v1/wake-up (workspace-scoped, data group — requires @Security WorkspaceAuth on the POST path).

post.description: Returns recent memories, active collections, and workspace stats. Mounted at both GET /api/v1/wake-up (unauthenticated, api group) and POST /api/v1/wake-up (workspace-scoped, data group — requires @Security WorkspaceAuth on the POST path).

get.description: Returns all registered workspaces with document/chunk counts

post.description: Computes the workspace hash for a path and reports whether it is already registered
post.summary: Resolve a filesystem path to a workspace hash

delete.description: Deletes a workspace and all its documents. When db is non-nil, deletion runs inside a transaction.

post.description: Creates or updates a document (upsert by content hash), chunks it, and enqueues chunks for embedding

get.description: Reports the running server version, migration version, and supported API range
Reports DB connectivity, uptime, and workspace count. Always returns 200 (degraded state is reflected in the body, not the status code).
